description: Sample dataset in Google Calendar API v3 shape. Used automatically when no real calendar is configured in data/site.yaml.

items.summary: Shootin’ Trap for Trips Annual 50 Bird Shoot
items.description:
The 14th annual Shootin’ Trap for Trips 50 Bird Shoot at the Carthage Rod and Gun Club, benefiting the Volunteer Transportation Center. $25 per person; registration opens at 8 a.m. and sign-ups conclude at 1 p.m. Food, refreshments, raffles, and a 50-50 drawing.

More info: https://volunteertransportationcenter.org/posts/shootin-trap-for-trips-2026/
items.location: Carthage Rod and Gun Club, 4500 Cold Spring Park Road, Carthage, NY
